Description:
Join James Montemagno and Kayla Cinnamon as they spice up your VS Code workflow with the latest GitHub Copilot AI features. From agent mode to custom instructions, we're turning up the heat on developer productivity. Don't miss this live cooking session!

🔗 Links: https://code.visualstudio.com

🎙️ Featuring: Kayla Cinnamon (@cinnamon\_msft), James Montemagno (@jamesmontemagno)

#vscode
Title: 🔴 Let it Cook - A Dash of Cinnamon
Author: Visual Studio Code
